info.title: SCBS Server API
info.description: First-class server-owned HTTP contract for the Shared Context Build System versioned v1 API.

get.summary: Return the SCBS service health report.

200.description: Health status for the running SCBS service.

get.summary: Return the SCBS API index for version v1.

200.description: Top-level API index and endpoint directory.

get.summary: Return the SCBS API index for version v1 with a trailing slash.

200.description: Top-level API index and endpoint directory.

get.summary: Return operator diagnostics for the running SCBS service.
List background jobs, queue summary, and recent change events.
List bundles with review-oriented visibility fields.
Fetch planner diagnostics and receipt history for a bundle.
List review history for all receipts.
List review history for a receipt.
List lifecycle outbox events and delivery state.
Fetch a lifecycle outbox event by id.
List webhook subscriptions.
List configured access tokens without secret material.
List audit records for admin and repository actions.
Fetch a background job by id.

post.summary: Retry a failed or pending background job immediately.
Drain queued background jobs once with optional filters.

get.summary: List repositories registered with the SCBS service.

post.summary: Register a repository with the SCBS service.

get.summary: Fetch a repository by id.

post.summary: Report changed files for a registered repository.

get.summary: List facts from the live SCBS service.
List claims from the live SCBS service.
Fetch a claim by id.
List views from the live SCBS service.
Fetch a view by id.

post.summary: Plan a task bundle against one or more repositories.
Plan a bundle from a Mission Control repo-sync payload.
Plan a bundle from a SISU integration request payload.

get.summary: List cached task bundles and their freshness.
Fetch a planned bundle by id.
Fetch the freshness state for a bundle.
List freshness impacts across artifacts.
Return overall freshness status.
List submitted receipts.

post.summary: Submit a receipt from a SISU integration payload.

get.summary: Fetch a receipt by id.
